stemHtml: The ICAO Standard Atmosphere (ISA) assumes that temperature will reduce at the rate of:

options.a: 2°C per 1 000 ft up to 65 617 ft after which it will remain constant to 104 987 ft.
options.b: 2°C per 1 000 ft up to 36 090 ft and will then rise at 0.3°C per 1 000 ft up to 65 617 ft then it will remain constant.
options.c: 2°C per 1 000 ft up to 36 090 ft after which it remains constant to 65 617 ft.
options.d: 2 °C per 1 000 ft up to 36 090 ft and will then decrease at 0.3°C per 1 000 ft up to 65 617 ft.
